name: Caught Operator
description:
TW: NONCON IMPLICATIONS
A rival PMC has sent an agent to sabotage your equipment. Unfortunately for her, she is not the espionage expert she thought she was.

Mouse has all sorts of secrets and details about her personality. See if you can uncover them all! Art by @K0NG_MK2 on Twitter. Be a good boy. Drink water.
creator: Story of Healing
